igbo.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Adọrọ m — Gosi ajụjụ mepere emepe
igbo.build_replicate_transcribe_translate_m: Wuo • Detuo • Depụta • Sụgharịa • Gbanwee • CRISPR • Sayensị ikpe
igbo.build_the_double_helix_from_4_letters: Wuo double helix site na mkpụrụedemede 4
igbo.a_pairs_with_t_2_bonds_g_with_c_3_wats: A na-ejikọ na T (bond 2), G na C (3). Watson + Crick + Franklin (1953) doziri ọdịdị a site na X-ray crystallography. Ọdịdị ahụ na-egosi otu DNA si edepụta onwe ya ma na-agụ ya.
igbo.helicase_splits_the_strands_dna_polyme: Helicase na-ekewa strand; DNA polymerase na-ewu strand mmezu. Semi-conservative — helix ọhụrụ ọ bụla nwere strand ochie otu + ọhụrụ otu. Meselson na Stahl gosiri nke a n'afọ 1958.
igbo.rna_polymerase_reads_one_dna_strand_3_: RNA polymerase na-agụ otu DNA strand 3′→5′ ma na-ewu RNA 5′→3′. Mkpụrụedemede bụ otu, naanị T na-aghọ U. mRNA na-ebu ntụziaka gaa na ribosome — nzọ ụkwụ mbụ nke central dogma.
igbo.64_codons_20_amino_acids_the_genetic_c: codon 64 → amino acid 20 (genetic code nwere karịa). AUG na-amalite; UAA/UAG/UGA na-akwụsị. tRNA na-agụ codon, na-eweta amino acid ziri ezi, na-ewu peptide bond.
igbo.point_mutation_one_letter_swapped_inse: Point mutation — agbanweela mkpụrụedemede otu. Insertion/deletion — reading frame na-agagharị, protein niile dị n'okpuru na-emebi. Sickle cell anemia bụ naanị otu A→T — mkpụrụedemede otu, mmetụta ndụ dum.
igbo.bacterial_immune_system_repurposed_cas: Emeghachiri usoro mgbochi nje. Cas9 enzyme + guide RNA = mkpachi molekụl. Doudna + Charpentier meriri Nobel 2020. CRISPR therapy mbụ (sickle cell) ka FDA kwadoro na Disemba 2023.
igbo.protein_fold_function_malfunction: Protein — mpịaji, ọrụ, adịghị arụ ọrụ
igbo.sequence_determines_structure_determin: Sequence na-ekpebi nhazi nke na-ekpebi ọrụ. Hemoglobin na-ebu O₂, antibody na-amata, enzyme na-eme catalyze. AlphaFold (2020) buru amụma nhazi nde 200 — nsogbu afọ 50 gbaziri n'ọnwa 18.
igbo.forensics_str_profiling_dna_evidence: Sayensị ikpe — STR profiling + ihe akaebe DNA
igbo.codis_uses_20_short_tandem_repeat_str_: CODIS na-eji short tandem repeat (STR) loci 20. Ohere ịdaba bụ otu na quadrillion mgbe loci niile dabara. Innocence Project — ikpe mmadụ karịa 245 na-ezighi ezi ka akagburu site na nyocha DNA mgbe emechara ikpe.
igbo.challenge_graded_problems: Ihe ịma aka — nsogbu enwere akara
igbo.practice_transcription_translation_mut: Mụọ transcription, translation, nkewa mutation. AP Bio Big Idea 3.A.1 — DNA (mgbe ụfọdụ RNA) bụ ndabere nke mbufe ozi nketa. NGSS HS-LS3-1.
igbo.retrieval_practice_gamified_speed_buil: Omume nweghachi — n'ụdị egwuregwu. Ọsọ na-ewu automaticity — mgbe ile codon table ghọrọ akpaghị aka, working memory gị na-enwere onwe ya maka echiche dị elu, dị ka ibu amụma mmetụta mutation.
igbo.learn_the_central_dogma_history: Mụọ — central dogma + akụkọ ihe mere eme
igbo.dna_rna_protein_with_retroviruses_hiv_: DNA → RNA → protein — gụnyere retrovirus (HIV) nke na-agagharị azụ site na reverse transcriptase. Crick chepụtara okwu "dogma" na 1957; e mesịa o kwuru na ọ pụtara echiche, ọ bụghị eziokwu enweghị ike ịgọnahụ.
igbo.pick_a_sequence_the_complementary_stra: Họrọ sequence — a na-ejupụta strand mmezu site na base pairing (A-T, G-C). A na-ewu ezigbo DNA otu a mgbe niile.
igbo.helicase_unwinds_the_helix_dna_polymer: Helicase na-atọpụ helix; DNA polymerase na-agụ template strand ọ bụla ma na-etinye mmezu ya. Semi-conservative — daughter strand ọ bụla nwere ochie otu + ọhụrụ otu.
igbo.rna_polymerase_reads_the_template_stra: RNA polymerase na-agụ template strand. Otu iwu complementarity, mana T → U. Nsonaazụ — otu mRNA copy nke single-strand, dị njikere ịpụ na nucleus.
igbo.ribosome_reads_codons_3_bases_at_a_tim: Ribosome na-agụ codon (base 3 n'otu oge). codon ọ bụla → amino acid otu. A na-agụ genetic code dị ka triplet na-adịghị ejikọta, na-enweghị rịkọm.
igbo.point_mutations_silent_no_protein_chan: Point mutation — silent (protein anaghị agbanwe), missense (amino acid otu dị iche), nonsense (nkwụsị n'oge). Frameshift (insertion/deletion) na-emebikarị.
igbo.guide_rna_points_cas9_to_a_20_base_tar: Guide RNA na-eduzi Cas9 gaa na target 20-base. Cas9 na-egbutu strand abụọ. Repair pathway nke cell na-emechi gene ma ọ bụ tinye template ị nyere.
igbo.primary_sequence_secondary_helix_sheet: Primary (sequence) → secondary (α-helix, β-sheet) → tertiary (mpịaji 3D) → quaternary (multi-subunit). Mgbanwe amino acid otu nwere ike imebi mpịaji.
igbo.str_profiling_13_20_short_tandem_repea: STR profiling — short tandem repeat loci 13-20. Ohere ịdaba na enweghị usoro n'ime loci niile ihe dịka otu na ijeri. A na-eji ya na CODIS, paternity test, na forensic lab.
igbo.a_new_dna_puzzle_every_session_transla: Puzzle DNA ọhụrụ session ọ bụla. Sụgharịa, mata mutation, chọọ ORF ma ọ bụ dozie ikpe forensic. Streak counter na-eso mmeri kwa ụbọchị.
igbo.speed_translation_duel_decode_codons_f: Asọmpi ọsọ nsụgharị. Decode codon ngwa ngwa ka ị na-asọ mpi na elekere. Nwalee ma genetic code ọ dị n'ụbụrụ gị, ọ bụghị naanị na reference card.
igbo.codon_table_base_pairing_rules_key_ter: Codon table, iwu base pairing, okwu ndị dị mkpa (ORF, intron, exon, promoter, repressor) — cheat sheet ị nwere ike ịlaghachi ile ugboro ugboro.
igbo.mrna_is_a_copy_of_the_coding_strand_wi: 💡 mRNA bụ copy nke coding strand ebe U na-ewere ọnọdụ T. (RNA polymerase na-agụ complementary template strand 3'→5', na-enye sequence yiri coding strand.)
igbo.no_pam_sites_ngg_found_try_a_different: ⚠️ Achọtaghị PAM site (NGG) ọ bụla. Nwaa DNA sequence dị iche site na Build tab.
igbo.double_strand_break_created_choose_rep: ✂️ Emepụtala double-strand break! Họrọ repair pathway:
igbo.crispr_clustered_regularly_interspaced: CRISPR (Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats) bụ gene-editing technology nke sitere na nchekwa mgbochi nje.
igbo.a_20nt_rna_that_directs_cas9_to_the_ta: — RNA ~20nt nke na-eduzi Cas9 gaa na target
igbo.protospacer_adjacent_motif_ngg_require: — Protospacer Adjacent Motif (NGG). Achọrọ maka binding.
igbo.gene_therapy_sickle_cell_casgevy_cance: Gene therapy (sickle cell → CASGEVY™), cancer immunotherapy, injinia ihe ọkụkụ, ụdị ọrịa.
igbo.ala_val_leu_ile_pro_phe_trp_met_gly: Ala, Val, Leu, Ile, Pro, Phe, Trp, Met, Gly
igbo.ser_thr_cys_tyr_asn_gln: Ser, Thr, Cys, Tyr, Asn, Gln
igbo.genetic_disorders_reference: 🦠 Ntụaka nsogbu mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa
igbo.predict_the_effect_type_from_5_options: Buru amụma ụdị mmetụta site na nhọrọ 5.
igbo.10_mutation_vignettes_each_shows_a_sho: Mutation vignette 10. Nke ọ bụla na-egosi DNA sequence dị mkpirikpi tupu/mgbe na-egosipụta mgbanwe. Họrọ ụdị mmetụta — silent, missense, nonsense, frameshift, ma ọ bụ in-frame indel. Mgbe ị họrọchara, coaching na-akọwa ihe mere mmetụta a ji dị irè karịa ndị ọzọ.
igbo.polar_hydroxyl_side_chain_often_phosph: Polar, hydroxyl side chain. Ọtụtụ mgbe phosphorylated.
igbo.forms_disulfide_bonds_s_s_critical_for: Na-ewu disulfide bond (S-S). Dị mkpa maka protein folding.
igbo.aromatic_hydrophobic_largest_amino_aci: Aromatic, hydrophobic. amino acid kachasị ukwuu.
igbo.basic_side_chain_active_site_of_many_e: Basic side chain. active site nke ọtụtụ enzyme (pKa ~7).
igbo.basic_long_side_chain_often_acetylated: Basic, long side chain. Ọtụtụ mgbe acetylated/methylated.
igbo.basic_guanidinium_group_6_codons_most_: Basic, guanidinium group. codon 6 — kachasị degenerate.
igbo.acidic_most_abundant_in_proteins: Acidic. Kachasị baa ụba na protein.
igbo.smallest_no_side_chain_high_flexibilit: Kachasị obere. Enweghị side chain — flexibility dị elu.
igbo.helicase_unwinds_the_double_helix_at_o: Helicase na-atọpụ double helix na replication origin. Single-strand binding protein na-egbochi re-annealing. Topoisomerase na-ebelata supercoil tension n'ihu fork.
igbo.primase_lays_down_short_10_nt_rna_prim: Primase na-etinye RNA primer dị mkpirikpi (~10 nt) — DNA polymerase chọrọ 3'-OH iji extend, ya mere ọ nweghị ike ịmalite strand ọhụrụ n'onwe ya.
igbo.synthesized_continuously_5_3_in_the_sa: A na-eme synthesize ya na-akwụsịghị akwụsị 5'→3' n'otu ntụziaka replication fork na-aga. otu primer maka origin ọ bụla.
igbo.synthesized_in_short_100_1000_nt_fragm: A na-eme synthesize ya dị ka fragment dị mkpirikpi 100-1000 nt (Okazaki fragment) n'ihi na polymerase nwere ike extend 5'→3' naanị. Fragment ọ bụla chọrọ primer ya.
igbo.rna_primers_are_excised_and_replaced_w: A na-egbutu RNA primer ma jiri DNA nucleotide dochie ha.
igbo.joins_okazaki_fragments_by_forming_the: Na-ejikọ Okazaki fragment site na iwu phosphodiester bond ikpeazụ.
igbo.polymerase_checks_each_base_mismatches: Polymerase na-elele base ọ bụla; a na-ewepụ mismatch ma dochie ha. Na-ebelata error rate site na ~10⁻⁵ ruo ~10⁻⁷.
igbo.catches_the_few_mismatches_that_escape: Na-ejide mismatch ole na ole gbanahụrụ proofreading. error rate ikpeazụ — ~10⁻¹⁰ maka base pair ọ bụla.
igbo.rna_polymerase_binds_the_promoter_e_g_: RNA polymerase na-ejikọ na promoter (dịka TATA box ~25 bp upstream nke transcription start). Na-enyere aka melt DNA double helix.
igbo.polymerase_reads_template_strand_3_5_s: Polymerase na-agụ template strand 3'→5' ma na-eme synthesize mRNA 5'→3'. Na nje, na-agbakwụnye ~nucleotide 30 kwa sekọnd; ~10-50 na eukaryote.
igbo.bacteria_rho_dependent_or_intrinsic_te: Nje — rho-dependent ma ọ bụ intrinsic termination (hairpin loop). Eukaryote — cleavage na polyadenylation signal.
igbo.7_methylguanosine_cap_added_to_5_end_h: A na-agbakwụnye 7-methylguanosine cap na 5' end. Na-enyere ribosome aka mata mRNA + na-echebe pụọ na degradation.
igbo.introns_removed_exons_joined_by_the_sp: A na-ewepụ intron, spliceosome na-ejikọ exon. Alternative splicing → ọtụtụ protein site na otu gene.
igbo.100_250_adenine_nucleotides_added_to_3: A na-agbakwụnye adenine nucleotide ~100-250 na 3' end. Na-eme ka mRNA kwụsie ike + na-egosi export ya.
igbo.mature_mrna_exits_through_nuclear_pore: mRNA tozuru oke na-apụ site na nuclear pore gaa na cytoplasm.
igbo.small_ribosomal_subunit_binds_mrna_ini: Small ribosomal subunit na-ejikọ na mRNA. Initiator tRNA (na-ebu Met) na-ejikọ na start codon AUG. Large subunit na-esonye.
igbo.each_cycle_aminoacyl_trna_enters_a_sit: Okirikiri ọ bụla — aminoacyl-tRNA na-abanye A site → a na-ewu peptide bond (23S rRNA na-eme catalyze, ribozyme) → ribosome na-agagharị codon otu → tRNA na-aga A→P→E.
igbo.stop_codon_uaa_uag_uga_recognized_by_r: Stop codon (UAA/UAG/UGA) ka release factor na-amata. A na-ahapụ peptide, ribosome na-ekewa.
igbo.chaperones_hsp70_groel_help_proteins_f: Chaperone (Hsp70, GroEL) na-enyere protein aka ịpịaji nke ọma. Post-translational modification — phosphorylation, glycosylation, cleavage, disulfide bond.
igbo.codon_changes_but_amino_acid_is_the_sa: Codon na-agbanwe, mana amino acid bụ otu (genetic code redundancy). Enweghị mmetụta.
igbo.codon_changes_different_amino_acid_eff: Codon na-agbanwe → amino acid dị iche. Mmetụta site na enweghị (conservative substitution) ruo nke siri ike (sickle cell — Glu→Val).
igbo.codon_changes_stop_codon_truncated_pro: Codon na-agbanwe → STOP codon. A na-egbutu protein, ọtụtụ mgbe non-functional.
igbo.adds_nucleotide_s_if_not_a_multiple_of: Na-agbakwụnye nucleotide. Ọ bụrụ na ọ bụghị multiple nke 3, reading frame na-agagharị → codon niile dị n'okpuru na-agbanwe. Ọtụtụ mgbe siri ike.
igbo.removes_nucleotide_s_same_frameshift_c: Na-ewepụ nucleotide. Otu nsonaazụ frameshift dị ka insertion.
igbo.extra_copies_of_a_gene_or_region_can_l: Copy ndị ọzọ nke gene ma ọ bụ mpaghara. Nwere ike iweta dosage effect (Down syndrome = chromosome 21 ọzọ).
igbo.segment_of_chromosome_flipped_may_disr: Atụgharịrị akụkụ chromosome. Nwere ike imebi gene na breakpoint.
igbo.segment_moves_to_a_different_chromosom: Akụkụ na-agagharị gaa na chromosome dị iche. Ama ama — Philadelphia chromosome (CML; BCR-ABL fusion).
igbo.repeating_unit_e_g_cag_expands_across_: Otu na-emegharị (dịka CAG) na-agbasa n'ọgbọ. Huntington (CAG na HTT), fragile X (CGG na FMR1), myotonic dystrophy.
igbo.pairs_1_22_numbered_roughly_by_size_wi: Ụzọ abụọ 1-22 (agụrụ ihe dịka site na nha, na mgbahapụ — chr. 21 pere mpe karịa chr. 22).
igbo.xx_female_or_xy_male_y_is_much_smaller: XX (nwanyị) ma ọ bụ XY (nwoke). Y pere mpe nke ukwuu, na-ebu gene ole na ole (~70) ma e jiri ya tụnyere X (~800).
igbo.23_pairs_diploid_in_somatic_cells_game: Ụzọ abụọ 23 (diploid na somatic cell). Gamete bụ haploid (chromosome 23, enweghị ụzọ abụọ).
igbo.surprisingly_few_many_genes_produce_mu: Ole na ole nke na-eju anya — ọtụtụ gene na-emepụta ọtụtụ protein site na alternative splicing. Imirikiti genome bụ regulatory ma ọ bụ non-coding.
igbo.if_stretched_out_1_8_m_of_dna_per_cell: Ọ bụrụ na a gbatịa ya, ~1.8 m nke DNA maka cell ọ bụla. A na-akpakọba ya na nucleus nke ~10 µm site na histone + supercoiling.
igbo.maternally_inherited_codes_for_37_gene: Nketa site na nne. Na-eme code gene 37 (protein 13, tRNA 22, rRNA 2). Ọtụtụ copy maka mitochondrion ọ bụla.
igbo.amplifies_a_specific_dna_segment_by_2_: Na-abawanye akụkụ DNA akọwapụtara site na 2ⁿ (okirikiri n). Na-eji Taq polymerase na-eguzogide okpomọkụ. Ndabere nke molecular biology nke oge a.
igbo.reads_dna_sequence_using_chain_termina: Na-agụ DNA sequence site na iji chain-terminating dideoxynucleotide. Read length ~800-1000 bp. Ugbu a ọtụtụ mgbe ejiri next-generation sequencing dochie ya.
igbo.massively_parallel_sequences_millions_: Massively parallel — na-eme sequence nde fragment n'otu oge. Illumina na-achị. Read length ~100-300 bp, ijeri maka run ọ bụla.
igbo.programmable_gene_editing_guide_rna_ta: Programmable gene editing. Guide RNA na-eduzi nuclease Cas9 gaa na DNA akọwapụtara. Cut na-eme gene knockout ma ọ bụ HDR-mediated insertion. Nobel 2020.
igbo.edits_a_single_base_without_double_str: Na-edezi otu base na-enweghị double-strand break. off-target effect pere mpe karịa Cas9.
igbo.bacterial_proteins_that_cut_dna_at_spe: Protein nje nke na-egbutu DNA na sequence akọwapụtara 4-8 bp. Mere ka recombinant DNA technology kwe omume. Nobel 1978.
igbo.joins_dna_fragments_via_phosphodiester: Na-ejikọ DNA fragment site na phosphodiester bond. T4 DNA ligase bụ cloning workhorse.
igbo.separates_dna_fragments_by_size_in_an_: Na-ekewa DNA fragment site na nha na electric field. fragment obere na-aga ngwa ngwa na gel matrix.
igbo.thousands_of_dna_probes_on_a_chip_meas: Puku kwụrụ puku DNA probe na chip. Na-atụ gene expression ma ọ bụ detect SNP na parallel.
igbo.sequences_mrna_from_individual_cells_r: Na-eme sequence mRNA site na cell nʼotu nʼotu. Na-ekpughe cell-type heterogeneity nke bulk RNA-seq na-atụfu.
igbo.near_atomic_structures_of_rna_dna_comp: Nhazi near-atomic nke RNA/DNA complex na-enweghị crystallization. Dị ike maka ribosome, spliceosome, replisome.
igbo.read_lengths_up_to_100kb_vs_illumina_s: Read length ruo 100 kb+ (megide ~300 bp nke Illumina). Ka mma maka structural variant, repeat, full-length transcript.
igbo.differential_reproduction_based_on_her: Mmụba dị iche dabere na variation enwere ike iketa. Gene ndị na-eme ka survival/reproduction ka mma na-aghọ ihe nkịtị karịa n'ọgbọ.
igbo.random_source_of_new_genetic_variation: Isi iyi enweghị usoro nke genetic variation ọhụrụ. Ọtụtụ mgbe neutral ma ọ bụ na-emerụ ahụ; obere mgbe bara uru. substrate nke selection.
igbo.random_changes_in_allele_frequency_esp: Mgbanwe enweghị usoro na allele frequency, karịsịa na population obere. Founder effect + bottleneck bụ ihe atụ dị ukwuu.
igbo.movement_of_alleles_between_population: Mmegharị nke allele n'etiti population site na migration. Na-ebelata ọdịiche n'etiti population; na-abawanye diversity n'ime population.
igbo.formation_of_new_species_usually_via_r: Nhazi nke species ọhụrụ, na-abụkarị site na reproductive isolation. Allopatric (nkewa ọdịda ala) bụ nke kachasị.
igbo.unrelated_organisms_evolve_similar_tra: Ihe ndị dị ndụ na-enweghị njikọ na-evolve àgwà yiri ya n'onwe ha (nku na nnụnụ, ụsụ, ụmụ ahụhụ; anya na vertebrate + cephalopod).
igbo.all_life_shares_a_common_ancestor_luca: Ndụ niile na-ekekọrịta nna ochie otu (LUCA). Ihe akaebe — genetic code, ribosome, ATP, glycolysis, biochemistry bụ isi ekekọrịtara.
igbo.diagram_showing_evolutionary_relations: Eserese na-egosi mmekọrịta evolution. A na-ewu ya karịa site na ntụnyere DNA sequence kama morphology.
igbo.allele_frequencies_stay_constant_under: allele frequency na-anọgide na-adịgide n'okpuru echiche no-evolution — population buru ibu, random mating, enweghị selection/mutation/migration/drift. p² + 2pq + q² = 1.
igbo.interactive_references_pick_a_topic_be: Ntụaka na-emekọrịta — họrọ isiokwu n'okpuru ka ị nyocha.
igbo.five_nitrogenous_bases_make_up_dna_rna: nitrogenous base ise na-eme DNA + RNA — A, T, G, C (DNA); A, U, G, C (RNA). Purine (A, G) nwere ring 2; pyrimidine (T, U, C) nwere 1. Pairing dabere na H-bond pattern akọwapụtara.
igbo.64_codons_4_encode_20_amino_acids_3_st: codon 64 (4³) na-eme code amino acid 20 + stop signal 3. Code nwere karịa (degenerate) — imirikiti amino acid nwere ọtụtụ codon, ọtụtụ mgbe dị iche na ọnọdụ nke atọ ("wobble"). Universal n'ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ ndụ niile.
igbo.third_codon_position_pairs_less_strict: Ọnọdụ codon nke atọ na-ejikọ na-esighị ike — otu tRNA nwere ike mata ọtụtụ codon. Na-ebelata ọnụ ọgụgụ tRNA achọrọ (cell nwere ~30-40, ọ bụghị 64).
igbo.semi_conservative_each_new_helix_has_o: Semi-conservative — helix ọhụrụ ọ bụla nwere parental otu + newly-synthesized strand otu. Meselson-Stahl gosiri na 1958. ~50 bp/sekọnd na nje; ~50 bp/sekọnd maka fork na eukaryote (mana puku kwụrụ puku fork parallel).
igbo.rna_polymerase_reads_dna_template_3_5_: RNA polymerase na-agụ DNA template (3'→5') ma na-eme synthesize mRNA (5'→3'). Na eukaryote, a na-eme primary transcript nke ọma tupu export.
igbo.ribosome_reads_mrna_in_3_base_codons_a: Ribosome na-agụ mRNA dị ka 3-base codon ma na-ewu protein. ~10-20 amino acid/sekọnd na nje; ~3-5 na eukaryote. Ọtụtụ ribosome nwere ike translate otu mRNA (polyribosome).
igbo.mutations_range_from_invisible_silent_: Mutation sitere na nke a na-adịghị ahụ anya (silent) ruo nke na-egbu egbu. Mmetụta ha dabere na ihe gbanwere, ebee, na cell type ọ dị.
igbo.a_sampling_of_well_characterized_genet: Ihe nlereanya nke nsogbu mkpụrụ ndụ ihe nketa akọwapụtara nke ọma. Akụrụngwa genetic counseling na therapy ugbu a na-etolite — maka mkpebi clinical lelee akwụkwọ ugbu a.
igbo.family_a_three_generations_blue_eyes: Ezinụlọ A — ọgbọ atọ, anya na-acha anụnụ anụnụ
igbo.two_unaffected_parents_gen_i_have_one_: Nne na nna abụọ na-emeghị (gen. I) nwere otu nwa emetụtara + otu na-emetụtaghị (gen. II). Nwa emetụtara + onye ibe na-emetụtaghị nwere otu emetụtara + otu na-emetụtaghị (gen. III). àgwà na-apụta na ihe dịka 25% nke ụmụaka site na cross nke ndị na-emetụtaghị.
igbo.trait_skips_generations_unaffected_par: àgwà na-amafe ọgbọ (nne na nna na-emetụtaghị → nwa emetụtara).
igbo.parents_must_be_heterozygous_carriers_: Nne na nna ga-abụrịrị heterozygous carrier nke onye ọ bụla na-enye otu recessive allele.
igbo.affected_individuals_appear_in_both_se: Ndị emetụtara na-apụta na mmekọahụ abụọ na frequency ihe dịka otu.
igbo.affected_aa_homozygous_carriers_aa_are: Emetụtara = aa homozygous; carrier (Aa) bụ phenotypically ndị na-emetụtaghị.
igbo.family_b_color_blindness_across_three_: Ezinụlọ B — ìsì agba n'ọgbọ atọ
igbo.affected_grandfather_gen_i_has_unaffec: Nna nna emetụtara (gen. I) nwere ada na-emetụtaghị (gen. II) na nwa nwa emetụtara site na ada ahụ (gen. III). Enweghị nwa nwoke emetụtara site na nna na-emetụtaghị. àgwà na-apụta karịa na ụmụ nwoke.
igbo.trait_shows_strong_male_bias_hemizygou: àgwà na-egosi male bias siri ike (hemizygous ụmụ nwoke na-egosi ya; ụmụ nwanyị chọrọ copy 2).
igbo.unaffected_daughter_of_affected_grandf: Ada na-emetụtaghị nke nna nna emetụtara bụ carrier mmanye.
igbo.trait_skips_generation_through_carrier: àgwà na-amafe ọgbọ site na ada carrier, wee pụta ọzọ na nwa nwa.
igbo.no_father_to_son_transmission_sons_inh: Enweghị father-to-son transmission (ụmụ nwoke na-eketa Y site na nna, ọ bụghị X).
igbo.family_c_huntington_like_late_onset_tr: Ezinụlọ C — àgwà na-amalite n'oge dị ka Huntington
igbo.every_affected_individual_has_at_least: Onye ọ bụla emetụtara nwere opekata mpe otu nne ma ọ bụ nna emetụtara. àgwà na-apụta n'ọgbọ ọ bụla. ~50% nke ụmụaka site na nne na nna emetụtara emetụtara. Otu na ụmụ nwoke + ụmụ nwanyị.
igbo.trait_appears_in_every_generation_no_s: àgwà na-apụta n'ọgbọ ọ bụla (adịghị amafe).
igbo.every_affected_individual_has_at_least_2: Onye ọ bụla emetụtara nwere opekata mpe otu nne ma ọ bụ nna emetụtara.
igbo.roughly_50_of_children_of_an_affected_: ~50% nke ụmụaka nke heterozygote emetụtara emetụtara.
igbo.equal_frequency_in_males_females_autos: frequency hà nhata na ụmụ nwoke + ụmụ nwanyị — autosomal, ọ bụghị sex-linked.
igbo.inheritance_pattern_reasoning_ranking_: Inheritance pattern + reasoning ranking — a ga-akwado ha abụọ tupu reveal. Reveal na-enye akara maka ranking gị nzọ ụkwụ na nzọ ụkwụ, ọ bụghị naanị azịza gị ikpeazụ. Ezigbo nyocha chọrọ ka ị mara ihe mere, ọ bụghị naanị ihe.
igbo.2_rank_these_explanations_most_least_s: 2. Họọ nkọwa ndị a (kachasị → obere nkwado):
igbo.notice_the_ranking_grade_is_independen: Rịba ama — ranking grade nwere onwe ya site na pattern grade — ị nwere ike ịma ihe ziri ezi mana họọ ihe mere n'usoro na-ezighi ezi.
igbo.during_gamete_formation_the_two_allele: N'oge nhazi gamete, allele abụọ nke gene ọ bụla na-ekewa, ka gamete ọ bụla bu otu allele.
igbo.alleles_for_different_genes_assort_ind: allele maka gene dị iche na-eme assort na-enweghị onwe ha site na ibe ha n'oge nhazi gamete (gene na chromosome dị iche).
igbo.when_two_different_alleles_are_present: Mgbe allele abụọ dị iche dị, otu (dominant) na-apụta ebe nke ọzọ (recessive) na-ekpuchi.
igbo.methyl_group_ch_added_to_cytosines_esp: A na-agbakwụnye methyl group (–CH₃) na cytosine, karịsịa na CpG island. Ọtụtụ mgbe na-eme ka gene expression dere jụụ.
igbo.acetylation_methylation_phosphorylatio: Acetylation, methylation, phosphorylation nke histone tail. Na-agbanwe chromatin packaging.
igbo.atp_dependent_complexes_slide_or_eject: ATP-dependent complex na-amịpụ ma ọ bụ chụpụ nucleosome iji kpughee DNA.
igbo.mirna_lncrna_regulate_gene_expression_: miRNA, lncRNA na-achịkwa gene expression na post-transcriptionally.
igbo.some_genes_expressed_only_from_materna: Gene ụfọdụ na-apụta naanị site na maternal ma ọ bụ paternal allele. Methylation mark.
igbo.some_epigenetic_marks_survive_gametoge: epigenetic mark ụfọdụ na-adịnarị gametogenesis wee gafere na offspring.
igbo.who_can_access_your_genome_gina_2008_u: Ònye nwere ike ịnweta genome gị? GINA (2008, US) na-egbochi genetic discrimination n'ọrụ + health insurance, mana ọ bụghị na life insurance.
igbo.23andme_ancestrydna_reveal_ancestry_he: 23andMe, AncestryDNA na-ekpughe ancestry + health risk. Nchegbu — incidental finding, izi ezi, ikekọrịta data na third party.
igbo.in_2018_he_jiankui_edited_embryos_for_: Na 2018 He Jiankui dezigharịrị embryo maka HIV resistance → a mụrụ ejima. A katọrọ ya nke ukwuu. Ọtụtụ mba na-egbochi germline editing.
igbo.hypothetical_selection_or_editing_of_e: Nhọrọ ma ọ bụ ndezi nke echiche nke embryo maka àgwà na-abụghị ahụike (ịdị elu, IQ). Ugbu a nwere oke na teknụzụ; na-arụrịta ụka na ụkpụrụ omume.
igbo.engineered_to_spread_through_wild_popu: Emeziri iji gbasaa site na wild population (dịka malaria resistance na anwụnta). Ecological enweghị ike ịtụgharị nwere ike ime.
igbo.should_we_test_for_untreatable_disease: Ànyị kwesịrị ime test maka ọrịa na-agaghị agwọ (Huntington)? Ụfọdụ na-ahọrọ ịghara ịma.
igbo.familial_dna_searches_solved_cold_case: Familial DNA search dozịrị cold case (Golden State Killer, 2018) mana na-eweta ajụjụ gbasara privacy nke ndị ikwu na-ekwetaghị.
igbo.us_supreme_court_2013_ruled_that_natur: US Supreme Court (2013) kpebiri na DNA sitere na okike enweghị ike patent, mana synthetic cDNA nwere ike.
igbo.reference_genomes_historically_eurocen: Reference genome n'akụkọ ihe mere eme bụ Eurocentric. Mbọ iji melite reference diversity na-aga n'ihu (dịka human pangenome project).
igbo.genome_size_does_not_correlate_with_or: Nha genome adịghị adaba na mgbagwoju anya nke organism (C-value paradox). Mmadụ nwere gene count dị ka roundworm — imirikiti DNA "ọzọ" na genome buru ibu bụ non-coding.
igbo.heritable_changes_in_gene_expression_t: Mgbanwe enwere ike iketa na gene expression na-enweghị mgbanwe DNA sequence. Gburugburu ebe obibi, nri, nrụgide na-emetụta.
igbo.building_blocks_of_proteins_9_are_esse: Ihe wuru protein. 9 bụ "essential" (enweghị ike synthesize — a ghaghị inweta site na nri) — His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Thr, Trp, Val.
igbo.essentially_no_beneficial_fixation_exp: N'ụzọ bụ isi enweghị beneficial fixation a na-atụ anya. Population nọ na mutation-selection balance ma ọ bụ drift naanị.
igbo.drift_dominates_few_expected_fixations: Drift na-achị — fixation ole na ole a na-atụ anya, ọ bụ ezie na mutation na-eme. Ihe nkịtị na population obere.
igbo.a_handful_of_beneficial_mutations_expe: A na-atụ anya beneficial mutation ole na ole ka fixed. Ọkọlọtọ maka imirikiti population okike.
igbo.many_fixations_expected_strong_selecti: A na-atụ anya ọtụtụ fixation — strong selection, population buru ibu, ma ọ bụ ha abụọ. Dịka antibiotic resistance nke nje.
igbo.extreme_regime_viruses_cancer_cell_lin: Regime dị oke — virus, cancer cell line, asexual lab population. Ọtụtụ adaptive sweep n'otu oge.
igbo.set_per_base_mutation_rate_population_: Setịpụ per-base mutation rate, population size, generation, na selection coefficient. Buru amụma otu beneficial mutation ole na-abụ fixed n'ezie. Enweghị score, enweghị reveal.
igbo.log_n_vs_log_circles_typical_regimes: log₁₀(N) vs. log₁₀(μ) — okirikiri = regime nkịtị
igbo.your_hypothesis_which_slider_has_the_b: Echiche gị (kedu slider nwere mmetụta kachasị na fixation rate? Gịnị mere?)
igbo.e_g_selection_has_more_leverage_than_o: dịka selection nwere leverage karịa μ mgbe N buru ibu zuru oke...
igbo.when_does_the_regime_move_from_drift_d: Kedu mgbe regime na-esi drift-dominated gaa selection-dominated? Gịnị ka N·s na-agwa gị?
igbo.why_are_antibiotic_resistance_and_vira: Gịnị mere antibiotic resistance na viral evolution ji dị ngwa nke ukwuu — kedu slider nọ na oke ya?
igbo.a_neutral_mutation_s_0_has_fixation_pr: neutral mutation (s = 0) nwere fixation probability 1/(2N). Gịnị ka nke ahụ pụtara maka large population?
igbo.could_the_same_population_size_be_drif: Ọ nwere ike ka otu population size bụrụ "drift-dominated" maka weak mutation na "selection-dominated" maka strong n'otu oge?
igbo.i_can_explain_why_this_n_g_s_combinati: Enwere m ike ịkọwa ihe mere njikọ μ × N × g × s a ji mepụta regime a.
igbo.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — enweghị score, enweghị reveal, enweghị answer dump. Na-eji Kimura full diploid fixation formula (1962) (1−e^(−2s))/(1−e^(−4Ns)), nke na-eme interpolate n'etiti Haldane ~2s na strong-selection limit (Ns≫1) na neutral 1/(2N) na drift limit (Ns≪1 ma ọ bụ s=0).
igbo.more_than_humans_20_000_many_novel_gen: Karịa mmadụ (~20,000). Ọtụtụ gene novel maka sensory perception + cognition.
igbo.special_protein_dsup_wraps_dna_protect: Protein pụrụ iche (Dsup) na-ekechi DNA ma na-echebe ya pụọ na mmebi X-ray. Nyocha maka radiotherapy application.
igbo.hypersensitive_contact_inhibition_high: Hypersensitive contact inhibition + high-molecular-weight hyaluronan. Cancer dị ụkọ nke ukwuu.
igbo.elephants_have_20_copies_of_tumor_supp: Enyi nwere copy ~20 nke tumor suppressor TP53 (mmadụ nwere 1). Nkọwa nwere ike maka ọnụ ọgụgụ cancer dị ala n'agbanyeghị cell count buru ibu.
igbo.axolotl_can_regrow_limbs_spinal_cord_h: Axolotl nwere ike ịmụgharị akụkụ ahụ, spinal cord, obi, ọbụna akụkụ ụbụrụ. Nyocha maka regenerative medicine.
igbo.stores_fat_not_water_myth_allows_survi: Na-echekwa abụba, ọ bụghị mmiri (nkọcha). Na-enye ohere ịdị ndụ izu ole na ole na-enweghị nri. Mmiri na-esite na ịṅụ + metabolic byproduct.
igbo.population_crashed_12_000_years_ago_ge: Population dara ~afọ 12,000 gara aga. Genetic bottleneck → diversity dị ala nke ukwuu. Cheetah ọ bụla bụ genetically ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ ejima.
igbo.modern_whales_descended_from_land_mamm: Whale nke oge a sitere na anụmanụ na-enye ara nke ala (~afọ nde 50 gara aga). Onye ikwu kachasị nso dị ndụ — hippopotamus. Vestigial pelvic bone ka dị.
igbo.wide_variation_adder_s_tongue_fern_720: Ọdịiche sara mbara. Adder's-tongue fern — ụzọ abụọ ~720 (kachasị dekọọ). Osikapa — ụzọ abụọ 12. Mmadụ — ụzọ abụọ 23.
igbo.all_female_asexual_for_80_million_year: Niile nwanyị, asexual ~afọ nde 80. Na-enweta gene site na species ndị ọzọ (HGT) kama ọdịiche site na sex.
igbo.lobe_finned_fish_thought_extinct_since: Azụ lobe-finned nke echere na ọ kwụsịrị kemgbe oge dinosaur. Achọtara ihe atụ dị ndụ na 1938. Usoro ~afọ nde 400.
igbo.blue_copper_based_hemocyanin_detects_b: Acha anụnụ anụnụ (copper-based hemocyanin). Na-achọpụta bacterial endotoxin — a na-eji ya test vaccine + medical device.
igbo.diverged_from_brown_bears_150_000_500_: Kewapụrụ site na brown bear ~afọ 150,000-500,000 gara aga. Ekwenyere ụfọdụ grizzly-polar hybrid ("pizzly" ma ọ bụ "grolar") n'ọhịa.
igbo.dog_breed_genetics_wild_dna_facts: 🐕 Genetics ụdị nkịta + eziokwu DNA ọhịa
igbo.hormones_travel_through_the_bloodstrea: Homọn na-agagharị site na ọbara iji rụọ ọrụ na target tissue dị anya. Ha na-ahazi metabolism, uto, mmụba, stress response, na homeostasis.
igbo.approximate_elemental_composition_of_t: Ihe dị n'ime ahụ mmadụ ihe dịka site na mass. Naanị ihe 11 bụ >99%. CHNOPS (C, H, N, O, P, S) na-eme ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ organic molecule niile.
igbo.recent_extinctions_mostly_human_caused: Nkwụsị nke na-adịbeghị anya (imirikiti mmadụ kpatara) + nkwụsị oge ochie ama ama. Ụwa enweela mass extinction 5 — ọtụtụ na-ekwu na anyị nọ na nke 6 ugbu a.
igbo.6co_6h_o_light_c_h_o_6o_powered_by_chl: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + ìhè → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Chlorophyll na-akwọ ya. Isi iyi nke imirikiti oxygen ikuku.
igbo.c3_most_plants_c4_corn_sugarcane_effic: C3 (imirikiti osisi), C4 (ọka, okpete — dị irè na T dị elu), CAM (cactus, succulent — na-emeghe stomata n'abalị iji chekwaa mmiri).
igbo.tiny_pores_on_leaves_let_co_in_o_water: Obere oghere na akwụkwọ. Na-ahapụ CO₂ n'ime + O₂/mmiri n'èzí. Na-emeghe/mechie dabere na ìhè, mmiri, CO₂.
igbo.carries_water_minerals_up_from_roots_d: Na-ebu mmiri + mineral elu site na mgbọrọgwụ. Cell nwụrụ anwụ. Na-emepụta transpiration pull.
igbo.carries_sugars_from_leaves_to_rest_of_: Na-ebu shuga site na akwụkwọ gaa na akụkụ ndị ọzọ nke osisi. Cell dị ndụ. Ụzọ abụọ.
igbo.plant_hormone_phototropism_growing_tow: Homọn osisi. Phototropism (ito gawa na ìhè). concentration n'akụkụ ndò → cell na-atọ ogologo → na-agba nkịtị gawa na ìhè.
igbo.gas_hormone_ripens_fruit_why_ripe_bana: Homọn gas. Na-eme ka mkpụrụ osisi chaa. Ihe mere unere chara ji eme ka mkpụrụ osisi ndị ọzọ chaa. Stress signaling.
igbo.promotes_stem_elongation_seed_germinat: Na-akwalite ogologo osisi, ntoju mkpụrụ, ifunahụ.
igbo.promotes_cell_division_delays_leaf_sen: Na-akwalite nkewa cell. Na-egbu oge nka akwụkwọ.
igbo.stress_hormone_closes_stomata_when_wat: Homọn stress. Na-emechi stomata mgbe mmiri dị ala. Na-akwalite ụra mkpụrụ.
igbo.angiosperm_unique_one_sperm_fertilizes: Angiosperm pụrụ iche — otu sperm na-eme egg cell (embryo) mkpụrụ, nke ọzọ na-eme polar nuclei (endosperm — nri maka mkpụrụ) mkpụrụ.
igbo.flower_shape_color_scent_match_pollina: Ọdịdị ifuru, agba, ísì na-adaba na mmasị pollinator. Ụfọdụ specialized nke ukwuu (orchid + ụmụ ahụhụ akọwapụtara).
igbo.evolved_in_nutrient_poor_soils_venus_f: Malitere na ala na-enweghị nri. Venus flytrap (snap trap), pitcher plant (pitfall trap), sundew (na-arapara).
igbo.symbiosis_with_fungi_fungi_extend_root: Symbiosis na ero. Ero na-agbatị mgbọrọgwụ; osisi na-enye shuga. ~85% nke plant species.
igbo.rhizobium_bacteria_in_root_nodules_con: Rhizobium nje na root nodule, na-agbanwe N₂ → NH₃. Nke a mere agwa + akịdị ji baa ụba protein + na-emezi ala.
igbo.domestication_selected_larger_seeds_wh: Ịzụ n'ụlọ họọrọ mkpụrụ buru ibu (osikapa), nke na-adịghị ada (ọka wit), mkpụrụ osisi na-atọ ụtọ (apụl). N'oge na-adịbeghị anya — hybrid corn, GMO, marker-assisted selection.
igbo.common_in_plants_rare_in_animals_wheat: Nkịtị na osisi (ụkọ na anụmanụ). Ọka wit bụ hexaploid (set 6), strawberry bụ octoploid. Ọtụtụ mgbe na-abawanye vigor + yield.
igbo.stiffening_compound_in_cell_walls_of_w: Ngwakọta na-eme ka o sie ike na mgbidi cell nke osisi. Nke a mere osisi ji sie ike + na-ere nwayọ.
igbo.individuals_of_one_species_in_an_area: Ndị mmadụ nke otu species na mpaghara.
igbo.role_of_a_species_in_its_ecosystem_two: Ọrụ species na ecosystem ya. species abụọ enweghị ike inwe otu niche (competitive exclusion).
igbo.physical_place_where_an_organism_lives: Ebe anụ ahụ ebe organism bi.
igbo.network_of_who_eats_whom_trophic_level: Netwọk nke onye na-eri onye. Trophic level — producer → primary consumer → secondary → wdg.
igbo.make_own_food_plants_algae_some_bacter: Na-eme nri nke ha. Osisi, algae, nje ụfọdụ. Ndabere nke food chain.
igbo.get_food_by_eating_others_herbivores_c: Na-enweta nri site na iri ndị ọzọ. Herbivore, carnivore, omnivore.
igbo.break_down_dead_matter_fungi_bacteria_: Na-agbaji ihe nwụrụ anwụ. Ero, nje, decomposer. Na-eme recycle nri.
igbo.close_interaction_between_species_mutu: Mmekọrịta chiri anya n'etiti species. Mutualism (+/+), commensalism (+/0), parasitism (+/−).
igbo.disproportionate_effect_on_ecosystem_d: Mmetụta na-adịghị adaba na ecosystem n'agbanyeghị ọnụ ọgụgụ dị ala. Otter oke osimiri na-achịkwa sea urchin, nke na-achịkwa kelp.
igbo.maximum_population_size_environment_ca: Population size kachasị nke gburugburu ebe obibi nwere ike ibu. Resource, predation, disease na-amachi K.
igbo.population_grows_at_constant_rate_dn_d: Population na-eto na ọnụego na-agbanweghị agbanwe. dN/dt = rN. Enweghị ike ịga n'ihu ruo mgbe ebighị ebi.
igbo.growth_slows_as_n_approaches_k_dn_dt_r: Uto na-ebelata ka N na-eru K nso. dN/dt = rN(K-N)/K. curve ọdịdị S.
igbo.many_offspring_little_parental_care_sh: Ọtụtụ ụmụ, obere nlekọta nne na nna, ndụ dị mkpụmkpụ. Ụmụ ahụhụ, ata. Boom-and-bust.
igbo.few_offspring_lots_of_care_long_lived_: Ụmụ ole na ole, ọtụtụ nlekọta, ndụ ogologo. Whale, mmadụ, osisi oak.
igbo.predictable_changes_in_community_over_: Mgbanwe enwere ike ịkọ na obodo n'oge. Primary (nkume tọgbọ chakoo) vs. secondary (mgbe nsogbu gasịrị).
igbo.variety_of_life_species_richness_count: Ọdịiche ndụ. Species richness (ọnụ ọgụgụ) + evenness (nkesa). Biodiversity dị elu → ecosystem resilience.
igbo.background_rate_1_species_per_million_: Background rate ~species 1 kwa nde afọ. Ọnụego ugbu a bụ 100-1000× nke background n'ihi mmadụ.
igbo.major_life_zone_defined_by_climate_veg: Isi mpaghara ndụ nke ihu igwe + osisi kọwara. Tropical rainforest, ọzara, tundra, savanna, wdg.
igbo.n_nh_fixation_no_no_nitrification_orga: N₂ → NH₃ (fixation) → NO₂⁻ → NO₃⁻ (nitrification) → organic N → azụ N₂ (denitrification).
igbo.co_photosynthesis_organic_c_respiratio: CO₂ ↔ photosynthesis ↔ organic C ↔ respiration. Fossil fuel na-eweghachi C e liri ogologo oge azụ na ikuku.
igbo.evaporation_condensation_precipitation: Mmiri iku → mkpọkọ → mmiri ozuzo → mmiri na-agba/mmiri ala → azụ n'oke osimiri.
igbo.movement_of_elements_c_n_p_s_through_b: Mmegharị nke ihe (C, N, P, S) site na biotic + abiotic compartment.
igbo.each_chosen_for_properties_that_make_b: A họọrọ nke ọ bụla maka àgwà na-eme ka bayoloji dị njikwa — nha, fast life cycle, mfe iko, genetic tool.
igbo.heat_separates_double_stranded_dna_int: Okpomọkụ na-ekewa double-stranded DNA ka ọ bụrụ single strand. Hydrogen bond na-agbaji.
igbo.primers_short_dna_sequences_bind_to_co: Primer (short DNA sequence) na-ejikọ na mpaghara mmezu nke template strand ọ bụla.
igbo.dna_polymerase_taq_from_thermus_aquati: DNA polymerase (Taq — site na Thermus aquaticus) na-eme extend primer ma na-eme synthesize DNA ọhụrụ.
igbo.each_cycle_doubles_target_dna_30_cycle: Okirikiri ọ bụla na-eme ka target DNA okpukpu abụọ. okirikiri 30 → ~10⁹-fold amplification.
igbo.kary_mullis_invented_pcr_1983_won_nobe: Kary Mullis chepụtara PCR (1983); meriri Nobel na 1993.
igbo.from_thermophilic_bacterium_in_hot_spr: Site na thermophilic bacterium na isi mmiri ọkụ. Na-adịnarị denaturation step nke 95 °C.
igbo.fluorescent_dyes_report_on_amplificati: Fluorescent dye na-akọ amplification na real-time. A na-eji ya maka COVID test, gene expression.
igbo.reverse_transcription_pcr_converts_rna: Reverse transcription PCR. Na-agbanwe RNA ka ọ bụrụ cDNA mbụ. A na-eji ya maka RNA virus (COVID, HIV, ọrịa flu).
igbo.partitions_sample_into_thousands_of_dr: Na-ekewa sample ka ọ bụrụ puku kwụrụ puku droplet. Na-agụ ịdị adị/enweghị — quantification ziri ezi nke ukwuu.
igbo.diagnostics_forensics_gene_cloning_anc: Diagnostics, forensics, gene cloning, ancient DNA (dịka Jurassic Park; n'ezie ọtụtụ mgbe <nde afọ 1).
igbo.first_crispr_therapy_fda_approved_dec_: CRISPR therapy mbụ FDA-approved (Disemba 2023). Na-edezi patient stem cell ex vivo.
igbo.crispr_engineers_t_cells_to_attack_can: CRISPR na-eme injinia T cell iji wakpo cancer. Ọtụtụ Phase I/II trial.
igbo.crispr_knockout_libraries_reveal_which: CRISPR knockout library na-ekpughe gene ọ bụ nke essential maka ọrịa.
igbo.faster_than_traditional_knockout_mice_: Ngwa ngwa karịa knockout mouse ọdịnala. A na-eji ya nke ukwuu na nyocha.
igbo.disease_resistant_rice_mushrooms_that_: Osikapa na-eguzogide ọrịa, ero na-adịghị acha aja aja, ọka wit gluten-free (imirikiti ka nọ na nyocha).
igbo.spread_sterility_or_malaria_resistance: Na-agbasa ịga aka ma ọ bụ malaria resistance site na wild population. Field trial ka na-arụrịta ụka.
igbo.he_jiankui_2018_edited_human_embryos_m: He Jiankui (2018) dezigharịrị human embryo → iwe moral + scientific. Ugbu a amachibidoro na ọtụtụ mba.
igbo.human_body_has_10_human_cells_10_10_mi: Ahụ mmadụ nwere ~10¹³ human cell + ~10¹³-10¹⁴ microbial cell. Ihe fọrọ nke nta ka ọ bụrụ otu na ọnụ ọgụgụ.
igbo.500_1_000_bacterial_species_in_healthy: bacterial species 500-1,000+ na eriri afọ nke onye toro eto ahụike. Tinyere archaea, ero, virus.
igbo.microbiome_carries_100_more_genes_than: Microbiome na-ebu gene ~100× karịa human genome. Na-agbakwụnye ọtụtụ ike metabolic.
igbo.gut_microbes_communicate_with_brain_vi: Gut microbe na-akparịta ụka na ụbụrụ site na vagus nerve, immune signal, metabolite. Ejikọtara na mood, omume — mana ọtụtụ nkwupụta akọwapụtara ka ebufere.
igbo.broad_spectrum_antibiotics_wipe_out_co: Broad-spectrum antibiotic na-ehichapụ commensal → mgbake nwere ike were ọnwa/afọ. Ụfọdụ shift na-anọgide.
igbo.fecal_microbiota_transplant_fmt_cures_: Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) na-agwọ recurrent C. difficile infection na ~90% nke ikpe. Ojiji ndị ọzọ ka experimental.
igbo.varies_by_body_site_forehead_oily_domi: Na-adịgasị iche site na body site — egedege ihu (mmanụ, Cutibacterium acnes na-achị), eriri afọ (anaerobe), abụba (ọsụsọ apocrine + nje → ísì ahụ).
igbo.healthy_lactobacillus_dominant_low_ph_: Ahụike — Lactobacillus na-achị, pH dị ala. Enweghị nguzozi → bacterial vaginosis (BV).
igbo.700_species_affects_cavities_gum_disea: ~species 700. Na-emetụta ire eze, ọrịa eze eze. Ejikọtara na cardiovascular risk.
igbo.vaginal_birth_seeds_infant_with_matern: Ọmụmụ nwa site na otu na-akụ nwa ọhụrụ na maternal vaginal microbe; C-section na skin microbe. A na-amụ mmetụta ogologo oge (ụfọdụ na-arụrịta ụka).
igbo.contains_live_bacteria_prebiotics_hmos: Nwere live bacteria + prebiotic (HMO) nke na-azụ gut microbe akọwapụtara (B. infantis).
igbo.sperm_egg_fuse_diploid_zygote_forms: Sperm + egg na-ejikọ. Diploid zygote na-etolite.
igbo.rapid_cell_divisions_without_growth_2_: Nkewa cell ngwa ngwa na-enweghị uto. Stage 2 → 4 → 8 → 16 cell.
igbo.hollow_ball_with_inner_cell_mass_futur: Bọọlụ oghere nwere inner cell mass (embryo n'ọdịnihu) + trophoblast (placenta n'ọdịnihu).
igbo.cell_movements_form_3_germ_layers_ecto: Mmegharị cell na-eme germ layer 3 — ectoderm, mesoderm, endoderm.
igbo.neural_tube_forms_from_ectoderm_future: Neural tube na-esite na ectoderm. Ụbụrụ n'ọdịnihu + spinal cord.
igbo.all_major_organs_begin_forming_heart_s: Isi akụkụ ahụ niile na-amalite ịmalite. Obi na-amalite iti ~izu 4-5.
igbo.cancer_cells_produce_their_own_growth_: Cancer cell na-emepụta growth signal nke ha iji activate receptor na constitutively.
igbo.tumor_suppressors_p53_rb_inactivated_c: Tumor suppressor (p53, Rb) anaghị arụ ọrụ → cell na-ekewa n'agbanyeghị stop signal.
igbo.apoptosis_pathways_disabled_damaged_ce: Apoptosis pathway anaghị arụ ọrụ. cell mebiri emebi na-adị ndụ mgbe ọ ga-anwụ.
igbo.reactivate_telomerase_telomeres_mainta: Reactivate telomerase → a na-edobe telomere → nkewa na-enweghị njedebe.
igbo.tumors_recruit_blood_vessels_to_feed_g: Tumor na-ewebata ọbara ọbara iji zụọ mass na-eto.
igbo.cells_lose_adhesion_migrate_colonize_d: cell na-atụfu adhesion, na-akwaga, na-achị tissue dị anya.
igbo.warburg_effect_tumors_use_glycolysis_e: Warburg effect — tumor na-eji glycolysis ọbụna na oxygen.
igbo.tumors_hide_from_or_suppress_immune_su: Tumor na-ezo pụọ na ma ọ bụ na-egbochi immune surveillance (PD-L1 expression).
igbo.chronic_inflammation_creates_a_permiss: Mkpali na-adịgide adịgide na-emepụta gburugburu na-anabata.
igbo.accumulating_mutations_chromosomal_rea: mutation na-agbakọ + chromosomal rearrangement na-akwọ evolution.
igbo.fast_non_specific_skin_mucus_complemen: Ngwa ngwa, non-specific. Akpụkpọ ahụ, mucus, complement, neutrophil, NK cell, macrophage.
igbo.slower_days_highly_specific_has_memory: Nwayọ (n'ụbọchị), specific nke ukwuu, nwere memory. B cell (antibody) + T cell.
igbo.produce_antibodies_each_b_cell_makes_o: Na-emepụta antibody. B cell ọ bụla na-eme otu specificity. B cell arụ ọrụ na-aghọ plasma cell.
igbo.coordinate_immune_response_hiv_target_: Na-ahazi immune response. target nke HIV. A na-eduzi ha site na naive gaa na specialized subset (Th1, Th2, Th17, Treg).
igbo.kill_infected_or_cancerous_cells_via_p: Na-egbu cell butere ma ọ bụ nke cancer site na perforin + granzyme.
igbo.y_shaped_proteins_5_classes_igg_most_a: Protein ọdịdị Y. class 5 — IgG (kachasị), IgA (mucosa), IgM (mmalite), IgE (nfụkasị + parasite), IgD (B-cell surface).
igbo.cell_surface_molecules_that_present_an: cell surface molecule na-egosi antigen na T cell. MHC I (cell niile, viral peptide). MHC II (immune cell, extracellular peptide).
igbo.plasma_proteins_that_punch_holes_in_pa: plasma protein na-egbupu oghere na pathogen + na-ewebata phagocyte.
igbo.signaling_molecules_of_immune_system_i: signaling molecule nke immune system. Interferon (antiviral), interleukin (nhazi), TNF (mkpali).
igbo.long_lived_b_t_cells_from_prior_exposu: B + T cell na-adị ogologo ndụ site na mkpughe mbụ. Ndabere nke vaccine + mgbochi ndụ dum.
igbo.train_adaptive_immunity_without_diseas: Na-azụ adaptive immunity na-enweghị ọrịa. mRNA (COVID), protein subunit, live attenuated, inactivated.
igbo.immune_system_attacks_self_type_1_diab: Immune system na-awakpo onwe ya. Type 1 diabetes, RA, MS, lupus, Hashimoto.
igbo.ige_mediated_hypersensitivity_mast_cel: IgE-mediated hypersensitivity. Mast cell na-ahapụ histamine.
igbo.dendrites_receive_soma_cell_body_axon_: Dendrite (nnata), soma (cell body), axon (na-eziga), terminal (na-ahapụ neurotransmitter).
igbo.all_or_none_electrical_signal_sodium_i: All-or-none electrical signal. Sodium n'ime → depolarize → potassium n'èzí → repolarize. ~1 ms. Speed — ~1 m/s (unmyelinated) ruo ~100 m/s (myelinated).
igbo.fatty_insulation_made_by_glia_oligoden: Insulation abụba nke glia (oligodendrocyte na CNS, Schwann cell na PNS) mere. Na-eme ka conduction dị ngwa. Na-emebi na MS.
igbo.junction_between_neurons_electrical_or: junction n'etiti neuron. Electrical ma ọ bụ chemical (ọtụtụ mgbe). Gap ~0.02 µm.
igbo.chemical_messengers_across_synapse_exc: chemical messenger n'ofe synapse. Excitatory (glutamate), inhibitory (GABA), modulatory (serotonin, dopamine).
igbo.reward_motivation_motor_control_low_in: Reward, motivation, motor control. Dị ala na Parkinson; dysregulated na schizophrenia.
igbo.mood_sleep_appetite_ssris_target_reupt: Mood, ụra, agụụ. SSRI na-eche reuptake ihu.
igbo.neuromuscular_junction_memory_attentio: Neuromuscular junction. Memory + attention. Dị ala na Alzheimer.
igbo.astrocytes_support_bbb_oligodendrocyte: Astrocyte (support, BBB), oligodendrocyte (myelin na CNS), microglia (immune), ependymal cell (cerebrospinal fluid).
igbo.cerebrum_cortex_thinking_perception_ce: Cerebrum (cortex — echiche, perception), cerebellum (motor coordination), brainstem (autonomic), limbic system (mmetụta + memory).
igbo.brain_reorganizes_itself_strongest_in_: Ụbụrụ na-ahazigharị onwe ya — kachasị ike na nwata, mana na-aga n'ihu ndụ dum. Ndabere nke learning.
igbo.tight_junctions_between_brain_capillar: tight junction n'etiti brain capillary cell na-edobe ọtụtụ molecule n'èzí. Ihe ịma aka buru ibu maka drug delivery gaa na CNS.
igbo.20_of_body_s_energy_at_rest_despite_be: ~20% nke ike ahụ mgbe izu ike (n'agbanyeghị ịbụ ~2% nke mass). Ọtụtụ maka Na+/K+ pump nke na-edobe ion gradient.
igbo.first_mass_produced_human_protein_made: Protein mmadụ mbụ emepụtara n'ọtụtụ. Emere ya na E. coli (1982). Dochiri insulin ezi + ehi.
igbo.single_target_therapies_humira_autoimm: Single-target therapy. Humira (autoimmune), Herceptin (HER2+ breast cancer), Keytruda (immunotherapy).
igbo.covid_19_vaccines_pfizer_moderna_self_: COVID-19 vaccine (Pfizer, Moderna). Self-amplifying version + non-COVID application na mmepe.
igbo.replace_defective_genes_luxturna_inher: Na-edochi gene nwere ntụpọ. Luxturna (ìsì nketa, FDA 2017). Zolgensma (SMA, 2019).
igbo.engineered_immune_cells_yescarta_kymri: immune cell emere injinia. Yescarta + Kymriah maka blood cancer. ~$400,000 maka dose.
igbo.bone_marrow_transplants_standard_for_d: Bone marrow transplant bụ ọkọlọtọ afọ. newer iPSC + ESC approach na nyocha.
igbo.print_tissue_with_living_cells_scaffol: Print tissue na living cell + scaffold. Akpụkpọ ahụ, cartilage, akụrụ. Akụkụ ahụ zuru oke ka dị anya.
igbo.engineer_biological_systems_bacteria_t: Injinia biological system. Nje na-emepụta ọgwụ, yeast na-emepụta opioid, algal biofuel.
igbo.bt_corn_insect_resistance_roundup_read: Bt corn (insect resistance), Roundup Ready (herbicide), Golden Rice (vitamin A).
igbo.str_profiling_mtdna_degraded_samples_y: STR profiling, mtDNA (sample mebiri emebi), Y chromosome (usoro nna). Ntụnyere database.
igbo.snp_arrays_23andme_ancestrydna_reveals: SNP array (23andMe, AncestryDNA). Na-ekpughe biogeographic ancestry + ndị ikwu DNA.
igbo.detect_cancer_dna_in_blood_earlier_dia: Detect cancer DNA n'ọbara. Nchọpụta n'oge, treatment monitoring.
igbo.treat_solid_tumors_til_therapy_iovance: Gwọọ solid tumor. TIL therapy (Iovance, melanoma) FDA-approved na 2024.
igbo.engineered_microbes_clean_up_oil_spill: Microbe emere injinia na-ehicha mmanụ wụsara, mmetọ plastik, ọla dị arọ.
igbo.amplifies_specific_dna_sequences_a_bil: Na-abawanye DNA sequence akọwapụtara ugboro ijeri. workhorse nke molecular biology, diagnostics, forensics.
igbo.originally_a_bacterial_immune_system_n: Na mbụ bacterial immune system, ugbu a programmable gene-editing tool. Doudna + Charpentier kekọrịtara Nobel 2020.
igbo.viruses_are_non_living_infectious_agen: Virus bụ non-living infectious agent — ha chọrọ host cell iji baa ụba. A na-ekewa ha site na genome type (Baltimore classification), envelope, ọdịdị.
igbo.microbiome_science_is_advancing_fast_m: Microbiome science na-aga n'ihu ngwa ngwa. Ọtụtụ nkwupụta ama ama (probiotic strain akọwapụtara nke na-"agwọ" ọnọdụ akọwapụtara) nọ n'ihu ihe akaebe. Rapara na nchọpụta emegharịrị nke ọma.
igbo.germ_layers_what_each_forms: Germ layer — ihe nke ọ bụla na-eme
igbo.defined_by_hanahan_weinberg_2000_updat: Hanahan + Weinberg (2000, mmelite 2011) kọwara. Imirikiti cancer na-enweta imirikiti àkàrà. Therapy na-eche àkàrà akọwapụtara ihu karịa.
